category_sources: source_facts.description says the tool generates Cobra applications and commands; official Cobra docs describe cobra-cli as a generator for Cobra CLI applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cobra-cli; official Cobra docs use the cobra-cli command name.
docs_sources: Official Cobra documentation site has dedicated docs and a getting-started tutorial covering cobra-cli.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/spf13/cobra-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Cobra docs describe generating Go CLI applications and commands.
